title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explains Pi, an agent framework designed to harness LLM capabilities in unique ways. The video compares Pi against frontier agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and others, discussing how increasing complexity in product harness layers affects agent architectures. Pi is highlighted for opening new use cases through its distinctive approach.
